parameters.query:
UPDATE ref.tax_checklist_responses r
SET
    is_applicable = '{{ $json.resp }}',
    responded_at  = NOW(),
    source        = 'EMAIL'
FROM ref.tax_checklist_items i
WHERE r.item_id    = i.item_id
  AND i.applicability_group = '{{ $json.groupCode }}'
  AND r.fy_year    = {{ $json.fy_year }}
  AND i.item_type  = 'DOCUMENT'
RETURNING
    r.item_id,
    i.applicability_question,
    i.applicability_group,
    r.is_applicable;
